mapper.select: select * from fish_points_goods where status = '0' and stock > 0 order by sort_num asc
mapper.insert: insert into fish_points_goods (name, image, type, points_cost, stock, related_id, duration_minutes, sort_num, status, create_time) values (#{name}, #{image}, #{type}, #{pointsCost}, #{stock}, #{relatedId}, #{durationMinutes}, #{sortNum}, #{status}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from fish_points_goods where goods_id in #{id}
mapper.update: update fish_points_goods set stock = stock - #{qty} where goods_id = #{goodsId} and stock >= #{qty}
mapper.select: select e.*, u.nickname from fish_points_exchange e left join fish_user u on u.user_id = e.user_id where e.user_id = #{userId} order by e.create_time desc limit 50
select e.*, u.nickname from fish_points_exchange e left join fish_user u on u.user_id = e.user_id where e.exchange_id = #{exchangeId}
mapper.insert: insert into fish_points_exchange (user_id, goods_id, goods_name, points_cost, status, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{goodsId}, #{goodsName}, #{pointsCost}, #{status}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update fish_points_exchange set status = #{status}, update_time = sysdate() where exchange_id = #{exchangeId}
mapper.select: select u.user_id as userId, u.nickname as nickname, u.points as points, cast(least(10, floor(u.points / 1000) + 1) as signed) as level from fish_user u where u.points > 0 order by u.points desc limit 20
select points from fish_user where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into fish_points_log (user_id, delta, points_after, type, related_id, remark, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{delta}, #{pointsAfter}, #{type}, #{relatedId}, #{remark}, sysdate())
insert ignore into fish_checkin (user_id, checkin_date, points_earned, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{checkinDate}, #{points}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select count(*) from fish_checkin where user_id = #{userId} and checkin_date = #{checkinDate}
select count(*) from fish_checkin where user_id = #{userId} and checkin_date >= #{startDate} and checkin_date <= curdate()
select date_format(checkin_date, '%Y-%m-%d') from fish_checkin where user_id = #{userId} and checkin_date >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 60 day) order by checkin_date desc
